---
title: "import_obs_and_visualisation"
author: "Wenkai_Zhong"
date: "2025-07-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
import_knmi_data <- function(date_str, 
                            data_path = "data/ToSend-01-20-2025/", 
                            skip_lines = 22,
                            filter_date = TRUE) {
  
  # Parse the date
  date_obj <- as.Date(date_str)
  
  # Extract year and month for filename
  year_month <- format(date_obj, "%Y%m")
  
  # Construct filename
  filename <- paste0(data_path, "kis_tot_", year_month, ".gz")
  
  # Check if file exists
  if (!file.exists(filename)) {
    stop(paste("File not found:", filename))
  }
  
  # Read the data with fixed width format
  data <- read_fwf(
    filename,
    skip = skip_lines,
    col_positions = fwf_positions(
      start = c(1,    # DTG
                22,   # LOCATION
                36,   # NAME
                84,   # LATITUDE
                105,  # LONGITUDE
                125,  # ALTITUDE
                145,  # U_BOOL_10
                165,  # T_DRYB_10
                185,  # TN_10CM_PAST_6H_10
                205,  # T_DEWP_10
                225,  # T_DEWP_SEA_10
                245,  # T_DRYB_SEA_10
                265,  # TN_DRYB_10
                285,  # T_WETB_10
                305,  # TX_DRYB_10
                325,  # U_10
                345), # U_SEA_10
      end = c(20,   # DTG
              34,   # LOCATION
              83,   # NAME
              103,  # LATITUDE
              123,  # LONGITUDE
              143,  # ALTITUDE
              163,  # U_BOOL_10
              183,  # T_DRYB_10
              203,  # TN_10CM_PAST_6H_10
              223,  # T_DEWP_10
              243,  # T_DEWP_SEA_10
              263,  # T_DRYB_SEA_10
              283,  # TN_DRYB_10
              303,  # T_WETB_10
              323,  # TX_DRYB_10
              343,  # U_10
              NA),  # U_SEA_10 (end of line)
      col_names = c("DTG", "LOCATION", "NAME", "LATITUDE", "LONGITUDE", "ALTITUDE", 
                    "U_BOOL_10", "T_DRYB_10", "TN_10CM_PAST_6H_10", "T_DEWP_10", 
                    "T_DEWP_SEA_10", "T_DRYB_SEA_10", "TN_DRYB_10", "T_WETB_10", 
                    "TX_DRYB_10", "U_10", "U_SEA_10")
    ),
    na = c("", "NA", "-999", "-999.0"),
    col_types = cols(
      DTG = col_datetime(format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
      LATITUDE = col_double(),
      LONGITUDE = col_double(),
      ALTITUDE = col_double(),
      U_BOOL_10 = col_integer(),
      T_DRYB_10 = col_double(),
      TN_10CM_PAST_6H_10 = col_double(),
      T_DEWP_10 = col_double(),
      T_DEWP_SEA_10 = col_double(),
      T_DRYB_SEA_10 = col_double(),
      TN_DRYB_10 = col_double(),
      T_WETB_10 = col_double(),
      TX_DRYB_10 = col_double(),
      U_10 = col_double(),
      U_SEA_10 = col_double(),
      .default = col_character()
    ),
    trim_ws = TRUE
  )
  
  # Filter to specific date if requested
  if (filter_date) {
    data <- data %>%
      filter(as.Date(DTG) == date_obj)
  }
  
  # Add some useful derived columns
  data <- data %>%
    mutate(
      date = as.Date(DTG),
      hour = hour(DTG),
      .after = DTG
    )
  
  return(data)
}

data <- import_knmi_data("2021-07-13")
```


#some visualisation tests
```{r}
print(paste("Number of stations:", n_distinct(data$LOCATION)))
print("Station names:")
print(unique(data$LOCATION))


data%>%filter(LOCATION == "201_T_DV")%>%ggplot(., aes(x = DTG, y = T_DRYB_10, color = LOCATION)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Temperature on June 3, 2021 - All Stations",
       x = "Time",
       y = "Temperature (°C)") +
  theme_minimal()



```
